title: Indulgent Jamaican Potatoes Bao
description: A delicious, vegan-friendly twist on traditional bao featuring fluffy Jamaican potatoes and crispy ssam-wrapped goodness.

ingredients.name: allspice
ingredients.notes: ground from freshly toasted allspice berries

instructions: Heat coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped scotch bonnet peppers and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the sliced red potatoes and cook for 5 minutes, until they begin to brown.
Add the allspice, thyme, and salt, and stir to combine.
Add the coconut milk and stir to coat the potatoes evenly.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 10 minutes, until the potatoes are tender.
Meanwhile, toast the ssam wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and heating them in the microwave for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the bao by spooning the potato mixture onto the center of each wrap, then topping with chopped cilantro and serving immediately.
